en.name: Zhuge Liang
en.summary: Shu commander holding the city together after his bluff fails.

en.name: Sima Yi
en.summary: Wei commander testing whether the empty city is still a trap.

en.name: Jiang Wei
en.summary: Shu officer trying to turn scattered troops back into a defense.

en.name: Old Army Sergeant
en.summary: Veteran from the Shu remnants who knows how fear spreads through a line.

en.name: Wei Vanguard Officer
en.summary: Frontline Wei officer pushing into the gate first.

en.name: Wei Scout
en.summary: Scout checking alleys, banners, and troop movement before the main force commits.

en.name: Courier A-Qing
en.summary: Messenger carrying orders between shaken defenders.

en.name: Peace-Leaning Gentryman
en.summary: Local notable arguing that surrender may save the city.

en.name: Holdout Captain
en.summary: Defense hardliner trying to keep the remaining fighters in place.

en.name: Weaver Woman
en.summary: Civilian watching the city choose between panic and bargaining.

en.name: Wounded Soldier Zhao
en.summary: Injured Shu soldier still listening for orders.

en.name: Granary Keeper
en.summary: Logistics hand counting what food and supplies remain.

en.name: Hidden Drummer
en.summary: Signal drummer using rhythm to make the city sound less empty.
